title: Meter Readers, Utilities
description: Read meter and record consumption of electricity, gas, water, or steam.

tasks.text: Read electric, gas, water, or steam consumption meters and enter data in route books or hand-held computers.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Upload into office computers all information collected on hand-held computers during meter rounds, or return route books or hand-held computers to business offices so that data can be compiled.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Walk or drive vehicles along established routes to take readings of meter dials.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect meters for unauthorized connections, defects, and damage, such as broken seals.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Verify readings in cases where consumption appears to be abnormal, and record possible reasons for fluctuations.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Report to service departments any problems, such as meter irregularities, damaged equipment, or impediments to meter access, including dogs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Leave messages to arrange different times to read meters in cases in which meters are not accessible.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Connect and disconnect utility services at specific locations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Answer customers' questions about services and charges, or direct them to customer service centers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Update client address and meter location information.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform preventative maintenance or minor repairs on meters.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
